SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT cdiAlertQueryCodeID ,cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription ,isSelectable , hashKey FROM( SELECT CDIAlertQueryCodeID AS cdiAlertQueryCodeID ,CDIAlertQueryCodeDesc AS cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription ,IsSelectable AS isSelectable ,hash(concat(IfNull(CDIAlertQueryCodeID,"") ,"|",IfNull(CDIAlertQueryCodeDesc,"") ,"|", IfNull(IsSelectable,false))) AS hashKey FROM CDIAlertQueryCode)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.cdiAlertQueryCodeID,"")=IfNull(t.cdiAlertQueryCodeID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN  UPDATE SET  cdiAlertQueryCodeID = s.cdiAlertQueryCodeID ,cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription = s.cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription ,isSelectable = s.isSelectable ,updatedDateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  INSERT(cdiAlertQueryCodeID ,cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription ,isSelectable ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime , hashKey) VALUES ( s.cdiAlertQueryCodeID ,s.cdiAlertQueryCodeDescription, s.isSelectable, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, s.hashKey)
